details.reasoning: Implementation successfully creates a comprehensive theme system with proper type definitions, three built-in themes (t3-dark, t3-light, t3-midnight), working ThemeProvider component with useTheme hook, and ThemeSelector with preview swatches. Theme persistence to localStorage and CSS custom property application are correctly implemented. However, the rubric explicitly requires 'Exported getTheme and listThemes utility functions in the shared package,' which are completely missing from packages/shared/src/theme.ts. The implementation provides BUILT_IN_THEMES and isThemeId but not the required getTheme and listThemes functions. All other requirements are met: no build configuration changes or new dependencies were added, proper color token structure exists, and integration into the settings route is complete.
